name: Green Chili Burros
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the rump roast at the bottom of a crockpot.
2. Add the chopped onion on top of the meat.
3. Sprinkle the taco seasoning mix, oregano, and garlic powder over the ingredients.
4. Layer the diced green chilies and tomato sauce on top of everything else.
5. Cook on LOW for 8-10 hours. Do not stir during the first 5 hours.
6. After 7 hours, shred the meat using a slotted spoon or by turning it out onto a plate and shredding with two forks.
7. Serve the shredded meat in warm flour or corn tortillas.
8. Top with sour cream if desired.
